    Constructor Description
    ArrayValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, A actual, Collection<E> actualAsCollection)
    Creates a new ArrayValidatorImpl with no validation failures.
    ArrayValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, A actual, Collection<E> actualAsCollection, List<ValidationFailure> failures)

    BooleanValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, Boolean actual)  
    ClassValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, Class<T> actual)  
    CollectionValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, C actual, Pluralizer pluralizer)
    Creates a CollectionValidatorImpl with no validation failures.
    CollectionValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, C actual, Pluralizer pluralizer, List<ValidationFailure> failures)
    Creates a CollectionValidatorImpl with existing validation failures.
    ComparableValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, T actual)

    FloatValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, Float actual)

    Creates a InetAddressValidatorImpl with no validation failures.

    Creates a ListValidatorImpl with no validation failures.

    Creates a ListValidatorImpl with existing validation failures.

    OptionalValidatorImpl​(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, Optional<?> actual)
